title: Raid on an Imperial cargo convoy

Nine months after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] '''raided''' an Imperial cargo convoy near the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Per Lupelo]].

A crime organization on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Per Lupelo]] had learned of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] cargo convoy passing close by and were preparing to hijack it. However, a [[Wyl Tarson|spy]] within the syndicate tipped off the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], which sent a group of [[YM-2800 limpet ship|Limpet ships]] supported by [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] to intercept the convoy. This marked the first use of the Limpet ships.

The X-wings eliminated the [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE]] escort, leaving the [[Imperial cargo ship|cargo ships]] all but defenseless. The Rebel operatives [[Able]] and [[Basso]] led a team of [[Marines (SpecForce)|SpecForce Marines]] into one of the cargo ships, using the Limpet's connect-and-slice arms. The boarders captured the ship's crew and gained its cargo for the Rebellion.

Soon, the other three cargo ships were captured as well, and the Alliance was victorious.

==Appearances==
*[[Rebellion 2|''Rebellion'' 2]] {{1st}}
